core_philosophy: TikTok organic dropshipping is the most powerful free traffic source alive. The product does the selling — your job is to show it solving a real problem in a way people can't scroll past. Test fast, kill fast, scale what works.

tiktok_organic_formula.overview: Post 3+ videos per day per product. Test for 3 days (9 videos). If no sales, kill the product. If sales, scale content volume and test paid.
tiktok_organic_formula.core_rule: Your content must make the viewer feel like they NEED this product before the video ends.

success_metrics.comment_rate: Comments = algorithm boost. Aim for 1 comment per 100 views minimum.
success_metrics.share_rate: Shares are the strongest signal. Anything shareable is gold.
success_metrics.profile_visits: High profile visits = curious audience = likely buyers

P_problem.description: Open with the problem. Make the viewer say 'that's me'.
tactics: Film the frustrating moment before the product
Name the pain in text overlay immediately
Use 'POV:' format to make it relatable
Show a messy, broken, or frustrating situation

O_outcome.description: Show the after state. The transformation. What life looks like with the product.
tactics: Show the emotional payoff (relief, surprise, delight)

D_demo.description: Show the product working. Step by step. Make it look easy and satisfying.
tactics: Include a 'wow moment' — the thing that makes them stop scrolling

principles: Sound like a real person, not a brand
Film vertical on phone — never landscape repurposed
Natural lighting > ring light (too polished = ad feel)
Real hands, real reactions, real environment
Include micro-objections and answer them naturally in the script

script_template.3_8s_problem: So I had this problem with [thing]... [show the problem]
script_template.8_15s_discovery: And then I found this [product name/description]...
script_template.15_25s_demo: [Show product working — most satisfying angle possible]
script_template.25_30s_outcome: And now [life is better/problem solved] — I'm obsessed
script_template.30_35s_cta: Link in bio — it's [price] and it ships fast. Thank me later.

must_haves: Wow factor — makes you say 'wait, what?' in the first 2 seconds
Solves a visible, common problem — viewer instantly recognizes the pain
Demonstrates well on video — the product IS the content
Perceived exclusivity — 'I've never seen this in stores'
Satisfying to watch — ASMR, transformation, or surprise element
nice_to_haves: Works for multiple niches or demographics
Has existing viral content you can model (not copy)
red_flags: Boring to demo — if you can't make a scroll-stopping video, skip
Obvious everywhere (saturated — Amazon Choice badge, every influencer has it)
Shipping over 2 weeks (kills reviews and repeat orders)
Too complex to understand in 15 seconds

optimal_posting_times.timezone: Central Time (CT) — adjust per target audience
optimal_posting_times.notes: TikTok's algorithm distributes over time — posting at these windows gives initial engagement signals that trigger broader distribution.

hook_formulas_for_ecom: POV: you finally found the solution to [problem]
Wait for it... [build suspense to wow moment]
I tested every [product type] on Amazon — this one won
Why is nobody talking about this [product]?
Things I'm ordering on repeat [product reveal]
Tell me you have [problem] without telling me [show product need]
The [product] that actually works (I've tried 6 of these)
Amazon finds that feel illegal at this price
Rate this find: [product reveal with reaction]
comment_baiting_strategies: End video with a direct question: 'Would you use this?'
Create mild controversy: 'Unpopular opinion: this is better than [big brand]'
Incomplete information bait: 'The link is in my bio — comment LINK and I'll send it'
Split opinion: 'Team [A] or Team [B]? Comment below'
Prediction challenge: 'Guess the price in the comments'
Reply to comments with new videos to boost thread engagement

angles: Problem-focus: lead with the pain, product as hero
Demo-focus: pure satisfying product demonstration, minimal speaking

decision_matrix.kill: Under 500 views average after 3 days, zero sales, no comments
decision_matrix.scale: Any video hits 10K+ views or 3+ sales in 3 days — double the content volume immediately

product_testing_protocol.never_do: Never judge a product on one video. Algorithm can suppress video 1 and push video 2 hard.

winning_product_video_structure.solution: 5-20s: product demo — show it actually solving the problem
winning_product_video_structure.social_proof: 20-25s: '10,000+ sold', customer comment, or 'going viral for a reason'
winning_product_video_structure.price: 25-28s: anchor to value or compare to alternatives, reveal low price
winning_product_video_structure.link: 28-30s: 'link in bio' or 'shipping is fast' — remove the last objection

content_volume_strategy.scaling_phase: Paid TikTok ads with best organic video as creative, maintain organic simultaneously
content_volume_strategy.creator_diversification: Even if solo, rotate personas, film locations, and angles to appear as multiple organic sources
